overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark forest at night, illuminated by a handheld torch. The player traverses grassy trails, rocky terrain, crosses a shallow stream, and ascends stone terraced paths in a survival game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy forest trail with dense undergrowth

events.description: character equips a wooden torch, casting warm orange light on the surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark forest holding a lit torch, illuminating the grassy path and surrounding bushes

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail covered with grass and leaves
dense green undergrowth lining the left side of the trail
tall trees visible in the darkness ahead
large boulder emerging from the vegetation on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night. The player walks forward through grassy terrain, illuminating the path with a torch that appears around the 10-second mark. Dense bushes line the left side while scattered rocks and trees emerge from the darkness ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with scattered boulders

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy terrain to rocky dirt path
approaching and entering a shallow stream crossing

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasingly rocky terrain with the torch, carefully approaching the stream

entered.detail: prominent boulder on the right side of the path
cluster of rocks scattered along the trail
small creek with visible water surface crossing the path

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes rockier as the player moves forward, with large boulders appearing on the right side. The grassy terrain gives way to dirt and rocks, and the segment ends as the player approaches and enters a shallow stream crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet forest path after stream crossing

events.description: carefully steps out of the stream onto wet ground
stone wall becomes visible in the distance on the left

agents.ego_description: crossing the shallow stream and continuing along the wet dirt path, approaching a stone wall

entered.detail: rocky cliff face or wall visible in the distance on the left side

segments.scene_description: The player crosses through the shallow stream and continues on wet dirt terrain. The surrounding rocks are left behind as a stone wall comes into view on the left in the distance. The path remains narrow and enclosed by forest vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone terraced path with rock wall

events.description: path becomes stone terraced steps with large rock formation on left

agents.ego_description: walking up stone terraced steps along a rock wall, continuing through the dark forest

entered.detail: terraced stone steps forming the path ahead
large rock wall and cliff face immediately to the left

segments.scene_description: The terrain changes to stone terraced steps as the player ascends along a large rock wall on the left. The stone wall that was distant is now immediately beside the path. The player continues walking forward through the dark forest, illuminated only by the torchlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest that transitions from a grassy trail into a rugged, ascending stone path. It begins by moving forward through dense bushes and grassy terrain, with a handheld torch cutting through the darkness to reveal scattered rocks and trees. As the player advances, the soft grass gives way to a rockier dirt path lined with large boulders before the camera descends into a shallow stream crossing. The scene then shifts to wet dirt terrain as the player exits the water, moving through narrow forest vegetation toward a distant stone wall. Finally, the path transforms into stone terraced steps that climb alongside the now-immediate rock wall, continuing deep into the dark woods under the glow of the torch.
